title: Figure 9 from: Shoman ME, Abd El-Hafeez AA, Khobrani M, Assiri AA, Al Thagfan SS, Othman EM, Ibrahim ARN (2022) Molecular docking and dynamic simulations study for repurposing of multitarget coumarins against SARS-CoV-2 main protease, papain-like protease and RNA-dependent RNA polymerase.
